issues.description: Missing first effect entirely: 'If you have [Gecko Moria] with 10000 power or more on your field and there are no other [Oars] cards, this Character gains +7000 power.' This is a conditional power boost effect with two conditions (LeaderHasType/specific name check + card presence check).
PlayFromHand is incorrect. [On K.O.] effect allows playing from trash, not hand. Should be 'PlaySelf' with source indicating trash, or context should clarify this is trash-based play.

[On K.O.] effect has missing mandatory cost/condition: 'You may place 3 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck in any order' before the play action. This should include a TrashCount condition (≥3) and a deck-ordering action not represented in current DSL.
